subject: Mudsdale, a large heavyset horse Pokemon with thick feathered hooves and a dark body, standing in a rocky earthy environment
description: A massive, powerfully built horse-like creature fills the frame. The body is dark — deep brown or near-black — with thick, heavy feathering at the lower legs and hooves that are encrusted with or made of compacted earth or rock. The creature stands at rest or in a slow forward motion on rocky, reddish-earthy ground. The stance conveys solidity and great weight. The background suggests an arid, rocky outdoor terrain under warm ambient light.
foreground: large dark horse-like creature with rock-encrusted hooves on earthy ground
background: rocky arid terrain, warm earthy tones
